problem: 兩 sid 全 raise httpx.HTTPError → 落到 terminal _write_cache({rows: []}) → 24h TTL pin transient failure。sibling _do_fetch_prices 沒 try/except 是正確 pattern。CONSISTENCY-1 lens 同一 bug 再次 confirm。
fix: 追蹤 saw_response 旗標;全 raise → re-raise 讓 caller _fetch_breadth 的 (httpx.HTTPError, ValueError) catch 處理(breadth=None for this cycle, next request retries)。CONSISTENCY-1 merge:同一 impl fix 即滿足

problem: dedup_key + cache_key 只用 end + refresh;若不同 lookback_days 同 end,concurrent 會 collide 拿第一個 caller 的窄 window
fix: cache_key/dedup_key 加 lookback_days 或 pad_days;兼顧 latent race + cache hit rate。實務:current caller only 用 default,latent bug 先修簡潔即可

problem: tx_last >= max(tail) always True 因 tx_last in tail,flat TAIEX + decaying McClellan 會誤觸發 bearish
fix: tx_last > max(tail[:-1]) and mcc_last < max(tail[:-1])(guard empty prefix)。symmetric for bullish

problem: 春節 window 導致 trading day 收成 < warmup + lookback
mcc/taiex tail 直接 slice 不 join by date,axis 錯位 → 錯 signal
fix: 先 inner-join by date 建 aligned list,再 slice window。或 short-circuit: mcc_last date != taiex_last date → None

problem: FinMind duplicate (sid, date) row 會將首日 phantom count + 破壞 axis
fix: per-stock loop 前 dedup dict(keep last close per date)

problem: F6 stale-lock 只覆 HTTPError branch,ValueError branch 無 test
只 shape assert 無 numerical assert;fixture net-zero → AD Line 應 ≡ 0,mcclellan 應 ≡ 0
只覆 empty-rows branch,httpx.HTTPError branch 沒 test
fix: 加 test_fetch_taiex_series_all_sid_raise_httpx_propagates(after F1 fix: 全 raise 會 re-raise,test 對應改 assert propagate)

problem: warmup 不足 orchestrator 端無 test 驗 mcclellan_oscillator/thrust_dot/centerline_cross 全 None
沒 cover 兩 stock disjoint date 的 union semantic
fix: 擴 test_count_sparse_dates_natural_axis 或加新 test 含兩 stock 不同 sparse dates
